zh.Probus, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾普侯布斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Glynn於大約1294年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir John Glynn27歲，母親Isabella Glynn24歲。她於1319年與Sir John Carminow在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年在英國可瓦爾博德明享年56歲。

zh-hans.Probus, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾普侯布斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Glynn于大约1294年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir John Glynn27岁，母亲Isabella Glynn24岁。她于1319年与Sir John Carminow在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年在英国可瓦爾博德明享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Glynn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Malachy, Dermot, Eamon, Liam, Niall, Ronan, Sean Patrick, Siobhan.
Welsh and Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Welsh glyn, Cornish glin, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Glynn (Cornwall).
Irish (Galway): shortened form of Gaelic Mag Fhloinn (see McGlynn ).

variants.name: Glines
meanings: Welsh: possibly an altered form of   Glynn  , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: McGlynn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Bridie, Colm, Declan, Donovan, Sean Patrick, Thomas Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Fhloinn, a patronymic from the personal name Flann ‘red, crimson’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Glynn was born about 1294, in Cornwall, England, her father, Sir John Glynn, was 27 and her mother, Isabella Glynn, was 24. She married Sir John Carminow in 1319, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1349, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Glynn est née environ 1294, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Glynn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabella Glynn, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Carminow en 1319, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1349, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Glynn um 1294 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Glynn 27 und ihre Mutter Isabella Glynn 24. Sie hat 1319 in Cornwall, England Sir John Carminow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1349 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Glynn è nata il circa 1294 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir John Glynn, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Isabella Glynn, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Carminow nel 1319, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1349, nel Bodmin, Cornwall, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Glynnが約1294年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir John Glynnは27歳，母Isabella Glynnは24歳であった。1319年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John Carminowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Glynn(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Glynn(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Glynn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John Carminow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 코른월 보드민에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Probus, Cornwall, England: Lannbrobus, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Glynn nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Glynn, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Glynn, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Carminow em 1319, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1349, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Glynn родилась около 1294 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Glynn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Glynn, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Carminow в 1319 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1349 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Glynn nació aproximadamente 1294, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Glynn, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabella Glynn, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Carminow en 1319, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1349, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
